all_candidates.topic: Are AI-generated OMR claims undermining NEET credibility?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The NTA rebutted 'unfair evaluation' allegations by NEET-UG 2026 candidates on July 20, 2026, alleging many OMR sheets were fabricated or AI-generated.

all_candidates.topic: Was the recent passport fee hike justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Ministry of External Affairs revised passport charges under Passports (Amendment) Rules, 2026, effective July 1, 2026, with news explaining the changes on July 16, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should railway fines be significantly increased for offenses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Indian Railways rolled out tougher enforcement measures with fines more than doubling, effective July 1, 2026, and explained in news on July 16, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is the government's E20 petrol pricing logic fair?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas clarified on July 11, 2026, why E20 petrol is not cheaper than pure petrol despite blending.

all_candidates.topic: Should large merchants pay UPI transaction fees?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The government is considering bringing back a small Merchant Discount Rate (MDR) for large UPI retailers, as reported on July 18, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven layoffs acceptable in Indian IT?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports on July 9, 2026, and July 18, 2026, indicate that 35,000 tech jobs may be cut in India due to AI adoption.

all_candidates.topic: Will new RBI rules prevent financial product mis-selling?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The RBI introduced new rules to protect customers from mis-selling financial products by banks, effective July 1, 2026, and explained in news on July 16, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Are banks justified in tightening credit card lounge access rules?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Several major banks revised credit card benefit terms, effective July 2026, with stricter conditions for lounge access, as explained in news on July 16, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should the government establish a national floor wage for all industries?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India published new Central Labour Rules for 2026 on July 9, 2026, including the Code on Wages which establishes an operational framework for a floor wage.

all_candidates.topic: Are UPI risk-based limits effective against fraud?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Union Minister of State for Finance stated on July 22, 2026, that risk-based transaction limits are implemented to curb fraudulent UPI transactions.

all_candidates.topic: Is MSRTC's 13.65% bus fare hike justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: MSRTC hiked bus fares by 13.65% in Mumbai, announced on July 17, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is EPFO allowing UPI withdrawals a positive change?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The EPFO completed a system upgrade supporting PF withdrawals via UPI and ATM from July 1, 2026, with news explaining the changes on July 16, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Will new US tariffs harm Indian exports?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The US imposed fresh 10% tariffs on India in a new trade move on July 24, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should buyer ITC be safeguarded from supplier GST defaults?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The GST Council is expected to consider a proposal on July 22, 2026, to safeguard a buyer's Input Tax Credit if a supplier fails to deposit GST.

all_candidates.topic: Should India rapidly expand hydrogen train networks?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India's first hydrogen train was flagged off on July 17, 2026, marking a milestone in green mobility.

all_candidates.topic: Should premium petrol remain ethanol-free?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Centre clarified to Lok Sabha on July 23, 2026, that premium grades of petrol will remain exempt from the Ethanol Blended Petrol program.

all_candidates.topic: Should GST operations become fully faceless?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The CBIC is planning to make GST processes faceless, similar to the income tax system, as per sources on July 22, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Will proposed FCRA changes ensure NGO accountability?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Indian government proposed 2026 amendments to the Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Act on July 23, 2026, focusing on tighter transparency.

all_candidates.topic: Will GSTR-3B auto-population simplify tax compliance?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The GST Portal introduced significant changes for GSTR-3B auto-population and locked fields from the July 2026 tax period.

all_candidates.topic: Will BRICS transport cooperation accelerate India's green mobility?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India hosted the 3rd BRICS Transport Ministers' Meeting on July 11-12, 2026, to deliberate on sustainability in infrastructure and mobility.
